name: linear
label: 线性 / Line
preamble: Minimal line / outline icons: uniform medium stroke weight, rounded caps and joins, no fill, drawn in a single dark colour. Clean, refined, geometric — like a Feather / Phosphor set.

construction.grid: 24-unit keyline; live area ~80%, ~10% padding; optical sizing so circles read equal to squares
construction.stroke: uniform 2 units, rounded caps and joins
construction.detail_budget: one core idea, <=3-4 elements, generous negative space
construction.shared_parts: reuse one canonical shape per recurring concept (person, document, frame, plus)

notes: The lightest and most reproducible style; sits well beside vector line-icon libraries.
